case_title: HSIE CHIEH LIU et al VS. SUH & KUK, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LIU, HSIE CHIEH LIU, AINI AS TO DEFENDANT SUH & KUK, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUH & KUK, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, HSIE CHIEH LIU, AINI AS TO DEFENDANT SUH & KUK, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, HSIE CHIEH LIU, AINI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUH & KUK, INC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,060.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN 30 DAYS AFTER DATE OF JUDGMENT, AUTHORIZE, DIRECT AND INSTRUCT THE ESCROW IN THIS MATTER TO DISBURSE THE SUM OF $4,000.00 TO HSIE CHIEH LIU AND AINI LIU, AND PAY COSTS TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
